hero.cardOne: Add the first business vertical with create <domain> --vertical when the product needs one.
hero.cardTwo: Full page markup, styles, and localized content render before hydration.
hero.lede: Start with a production-ready shell. Add MicroVerticals later for real business domains.

seo.description: UltraModern shell SuperApp with localized SSR, Module Federation, and framework-owned public metadata.
